raw_consumer_statement: I had a Home Depot account that had been closed by Home Depot due to inactivity. The account was re-opened fraudulently without my knowledge, and a charge was made at a store far from my home store. I only noticed when Home Depot collection calls came in. I immediately let them know that this was fraud, and also created an online profile to notify them of the fraudulent charges on XX/XX/XXXX. Home Depot 's fraud department is not responsive, and at first refused to close the account or remove the charges. I visited Citibank, the main bank that owns this credit card, and they had to call the Fraud Department. Finally, today, XX/XX/XXXX, the main charge is removed from my account, but Home Depot is not removing the late fees and interest charges related to the fraud. The Fraud Department hangs up on me or is closed, and Home Depot has been very difficult to deal with.
